items.name: Rupert Friend
items.description: Best known for Homeland and Hitman: Agent 47, Rupert was a member of the Players throughout his teenage years before going on to a stellar film and TV career.

items.name: Sally Wainwright
items.description: The acclaimed writer and director has been a member of the Players, directing several productions over the years. We even premiered one of her one-act plays in the 1990s.

items.name: Becki Sherlaw-Johnson
items.description: Our longest-serving member, Becki joined as a teenager in 1975 and has been a driving force behind the group — acting, directing and serving as secretary.
